name: should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
description: Test case for should adjust specified year params when year_offset is specified
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('WR')), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "pg"."season_year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "nfl_plays"."motion" = true and "pg"."season_year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "nfl_plays"."play_action" = true and "pg"."season_year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND((1.5 * COUNT(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)) + (0.7 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN nfl_plays.dot ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(nfl_plays.dot), 0)), 4) as weighted_opp_rating_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."nfl_team" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021, 2022) and "nfl_plays"."dwn" in (1, 2) and "pg"."season_year" in (2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score" AS "espn_open_score_0", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays" AS "trg_from_plays_0", "t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_0", "td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_1", "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_2", "tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays" AS "weighted_opp_rating_from_plays_3", "player_years"."year", "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "player_years"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.year = player_years.year and "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."year" in (2023, 2022) left join "t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83" on "t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1" on "td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1"."pid" = "player"."pid" and td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935" on "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935"."pid" = "player"."pid" and t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935.year = player_years.year + -1 left join "tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682" on "tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682"."pid" = "player"."pid" and tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682.year = player_years.year + -1 where player.primary_position IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_open_score > '0' group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_open_score", "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."trg_from_plays", "t39b9d549a3ec831f079a6039157caf83"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "td7ef1880166d34a3d9473ba1fce57ad1"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "t77790ee4476d1c1f077ec5f395419935"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "tef3b0583c93018eb09e3dc5b51369682"."weighted_opp_rating_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
